Inquiry_Type: The category or subject of the customer service inquiry. In this case, it would be 'Home Charger Installation'.
Year: The year when the customer service inquiries were made. In this case, it would be '2024'.
Inquiry_Percentage: The percentage of total customer service inquiries that the particular type of inquiry represents. In this case, it would be '28%'.
Report_Source: The department or source that provided the data. In this case, it would be 'Sales and Marketing Department'.
Report_Date: The date when the report was generated. In this case, it would be 'January 2025'.
